title: Goal Contracts and Observable Completion
description: Turn a vague long-running objective into an executable goal contract. Learners cumulatively produce a measurable goal and done-condition specification through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Write a goal as an outcome rather than an unbounded activity.
Attach observable success measures, boundaries, and evidence requirements.
Separate current objective, durable constraints, and optional next work.
